nasb.text: Although Herod wanted to put him to death, he feared the crowd, because they regarded John as a prophet.

esv.text: And though he wanted to put him to death, he feared the people, because they held him to be a prophet.

cnv.text: 他想殺約翰，但又害怕群眾，因為他們都認為約翰是個先知。

ccb.text: 他想杀掉约翰，但怕触怒百姓，因为他们都认为约翰是先知。

csbs.text: 希律想要杀约翰，可是怕民众，因为他们认为约翰是先知。
